diagnostics.GHA-NEEDS-002: Cycle in job dependency graph involving `{jobId}`
diagnostics.GHA-STEP-003: Step id was synthesized — consider adding an explicit `id:`
diagnostics.GHA-EXPR-002: Expression context `{context}` is not available in this scope
diagnostics.GHA-MATRIX-002: Matrix dimension `{dim}` uses a dynamic expression — cannot expand statically
diagnostics.GHA-SEC-001: `pull_request_target` runs in the base repo's context with secrets — never check out PR head code without `persist-credentials: false`
diagnostics.GHA-SEC-002: Possible script injection: tainted context `{context}` interpolated directly into `run:`
panel.title: Workflow
panel.exportMermaidLossy: Mermaid export omits run status, action icons, custom badges, and matrix expansion details.
panel.exportSvgLossy: SVG export uses foreignObject; for native vector primitives, export as PNG instead.
settings.fetchActionMetadata.label: Fetch action metadata
settings.fetchActionMetadata.description: Allow VMark to fetch `action.yml` from referenced GitHub Actions to populate the structured editor's `with:` form. Disabled means the form falls back to free-form key/value rows.
settings.actionlint.label: Use actionlint when available
settings.actionlint.description: If the `actionlint` binary is on your PATH, run it on workflow files for richer diagnostics. No effect if the binary is not installed.
settings.preserveYamlFormatting.label: Preserve YAML formatting on save
settings.preserveYamlFormatting.descript: When the structured editor saves changes, preserve comments, anchors, and existing formatting where possible. Disable to reformat on every save.
